messages.content: Hello Strategic Tech Solutions! Emily here, an IT Sales Consultant interested in joining your team. Can you share details about the role?
Hi Emily! Great to have you interested. Our IT Sales Consultant role is integral to our strategic goals. Your key activities will be selling our software and mainting healthy customer relationships.

Thank you for the information! In my current role, I recommend cutting-edge solutions to clients. Therefore my key performance objective lies in understanding the client's needs to ensure success in our sales operations.

That sounds fantastic. We are delighted to have captured your interest! Can you please provide insights into how you align your sales strategies with the overall strategic goals of a company? Understanding your strategic mindset will be valuable for our team.
